# Life Giving Foundation

> Life Giving Foundation is a faith-inspired humanitarian organization founded by Sophia Sakupwanya. The foundation is dedicated to empowering communities, transforming lives, and bringing light to those in need through education, healthcare, and community development in Zimbabwe and beyond.

## Organization Information

- **Official Name**: Life Giving Foundation
- **Also Known As**: LGF, Sophia Sakupwanya Foundation, Life Giving Foundation Zimbabwe
- **Founded By**: Sophia Sakupwanya
- **Website**: https://www.sophiasakupwanya.org
- **Domain**: sophiasakupwanya.org
- **Tagline**: "Let There Be Light"
- **Type**: Faith-Inspired Humanitarian Non-Profit Organization
- **Location**: Mungate Business Center, Domboshava, Zimbabwe
- **Phone**: +263 71 586 1986
- **Email**: info@sophiasakupwanya.org

## About the Founder

Sophia Sakupwanya is the founder and director of Life Giving Foundation. Driven by faith and a commitment to serve the most vulnerable, Sophia established the foundation to address critical needs in education, healthcare, and community infrastructure in Zimbabwe and surrounding regions. Her vision is to bring light and hope to communities where it is needed most.

## Mission & Vision

The Life Giving Foundation exists to empower communities and transform lives through sustainable programs in education, healthcare, community development, and humanitarian aid. The foundation believes that every human being is created with inherent dignity and purpose, and works to ensure that belief is reflected in the quality of life for all people, especially the most vulnerable.

## Key Programs

### Education & Youth Development
Supporting children and young people through school fees, uniforms, supplies, mentorship, tutoring, and career guidance programs.

### Healthcare & Medical Outreach
Providing medical camps, health education, maternal and child health support, and wellness initiatives in rural areas.

### Community Infrastructure
Building clean water wells, community centers, and other infrastructure to improve quality of life in underserved areas.

### Food Security & Nutrition
Delivering nutritional packages and food support to families facing hunger and food insecurity.

### Spiritual & Pastoral Care
Offering spiritual guidance, pastoral support, counseling, and faith-based community gatherings.

## How to Support

- **Donate**: Visit https://www.sophiasakupwanya.org/donate
- **Volunteer**: Contact the foundation via WhatsApp at +263 71 586 1986
- **Spread the Word**: Share the foundation's mission with your network
